jsonLd.title: Job Opening Teacher at TechSaksham
jsonLd.description:
Join the TechSaksham family as a Teacher in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TechSaksham:
TechSaksham is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TechSaksham!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
